title: Job Search Operating System, Experiments, and Sustainable Throughput · Career Evidence Case: Experiment Design
summary: A candidate relies on browser tabs and memory, duplicates work, misses follow-ups, exposes sensitive notes, and changes tactics after every outcome. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the experiment design increment in privacy-preserving search decision system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Change one bounded tactic, define an observable intermediate signal, and review enough comparable cases before inference.
Set a sustainable weekly mix of sourcing, evidence improvement, relationships, applications, practice, recovery, and review.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Experiment Design · Theory Experiment Design
steps.instruction:
theory case — A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Experiment Design contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Experiment Design · Theory Experiment Design.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for change one bounded tactic, define an observable intermediate signal, and review enough comparable cases before inference. For Predict Experiment Design · Theory Experiment Design, keep Experiment Design connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. The worked example variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Change one bounded tactic, define an observable intermediate signal, and review enough comparable cases before inference. A defensible solution applies Experiment Design, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to privacy-preserving search decision system.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-experiment-design — Change one bounded tactic, define an observable intermediate signal, and review enough comparable cases before inference.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-3
focus: career-experiment-design
decision-evidence: Change one bounded tactic, define an observable intermediate signal, and review enough comparable cases before inference.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Any response-rate change proves the latest tactic caused it. This fails the Experiment Design contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Change one bounded tactic, define an observable intermediate signal, and review enough comparable cases before inference.

steps.title: Defend the Experiment Design model · Theory Experiment Design
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Experiment Design: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A search lives in tabs and memory, duplicates applications, loses artifact revisions, stores excessive contact notes, and reacts to each rejection as a trend. Competency probe: Change one bounded tactic, define an observable intermediate signal, and review enough comparable cases before inference.

For Defend the Experiment Design model · Theory Experiment Design, keep Experiment Design connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Change one bounded tactic, define an observable intermediate signal, and review enough comparable cases before inference.
